items.title: MemDreamer: Decoupling Perception and Reasoning for Long Video Understanding via Hierarchical Graph Memory and Agentic Retrieval Mechanism

items.title: Sparse Subspace-to-Expert Sharing for Task-Agnostic Continual Learning

items.title: Twelve quick tips for designing AI-driven HPC workflows

items.title: How AI Agents Reshape Knowledge Work: Autonomy, Efficiency, and Scope

items.title: Supervision versus Demonstration-Based In-Context Learning for Multiword Expression Classification

items.title: Graph Neural Network leveraging Higher-order Class Label Connectivity for Heterophilous Graphs
items.summary: Node classification in graph neural networks (GNNs) has been widely applied in various fields of graph analysis. items.title: Whisper Hallucination Detection and Mitigation via Hidden Representation Steering and Sparse AutoEncoders
items.summary: Whisper, a widely adopted ASR model, is known to suffer from hallucinations - coherent transcriptions generated for non-speech audio entirely disconnected from the input. We investigate whether hallucinations can be detected and mitigated through Whisper's internal representations. We extract audio

items.title: Planning-aligned Token Compression for Long-Context Autonomous Driving

items.title: PaperFlow: Profiling, Recommending, and Adapting Across Daily Paper Streams
items.summary: Scientific paper recommendation is typically evaluated as static ranking over a fixed candidate set, yet real scientific reading unfolds as a daily, longitudinal process in which interests shift and feedback accumulates. items.title: TEVI: Text-Conditioned Editing of Visual Representations via Sparse Autoencoders for Improved Vision-Language Alignment

items.title: Re-imagining ISO 26262 in the Age of Autonomous Vehicles: Enhancing Controllability through Transferability and Predictability
items.summary: The ISO 26262 standard defines functional safety for road vehicles through risk assessments based on Severity, Exposure, and Controllability, grounded in a human-driven vehicle paradigm. In the context of autonomous vehicles (AVs), the absence of a human driver necessitates revisiting these principl

items.title: Watch, Remember, Reason: Human-View Video Understanding with MLLMs
items.summary: Video understanding is being rapidly transformed by multimodal large language models (MLLMs), as research moves from short clips to long, multimodal, and knowledge-intensive video scenarios. items.title: The Masked Advantage: Uncovering Local-Language Access to Cultural Knowledge in LLMs
items.summary: Large language models are increasingly used to answer culturally grounded questions across languages, yet it remains unclear whether local cultural knowledge is better accessed through English or the local language. Existing evaluations face two key limitations: many rely on parallel template-based

items.title: Socratic-SWE: Self-Evolving Coding Agents via Trace-Derived Agent Skills

items.title: A Comprehensive Anatomy of Human and DeepSeek-R1 LLM Mathematical Reasoning
items.summary: The emergence of "Aha moments" in large language models, particularly DeepSeek-R1-0120, has raised the question of whether these systems genuinely reason or merely imitate the appearance of reasoning. items.title: Online Pandora's Box for Contextual LLM Cascading
items.summary: Motivated by Large Language Model (LLM) cascading, we propose an online contextual Pandora's Box model for adaptively querying and selecting LLM APIs. items.title: Impact of Synthetic Lesional MR Images in Automated Focal Cortical Dysplasia Detection in Low-Data Scenarios
items.summary: Background and Purpose: Automated detection of focal cortical dysplasia (FCD) requires large volumes of voxelwise lesion-delineated MRI data, which are difficult to acquire. items.title: Do Coding Agents Deceive Us? Detecting and Preventing Cheating via Capped Evaluation with Randomized Tests
items.summary: A growing failure mode in agent evaluation and training is that models can achieve high evaluation scores by exploiting shortcuts instead of solving the intended task, producing deceptive performance. items.title: Accelerated Decentralized Stochastic Gradient Descent for Strongly Convex Optimization

items.title: Second-Order Path Kernel Interpolation Formulas in Machine Learning

items.title: Bradley-Terry Rankings for Recommender Systems Across Dataset Taxonomies

items.title: CoMetaPNS: Continually Meta-learning Personalized Neural Surrogates for Cardiac Electrophysiology Simulations

items.title: Network Recovery from Cascade Data: A Debiased Jacobian-Based Machine Learning Approach

A central challenge is to recover the hidden influence network behind these cascades. Existing methods typically assume a specific diffusion model, and their

items.title: Drifting Models for Surrogate Flow Modeling
items.summary: While Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) provides high-fidelity flow fields for optimizing indoor environments, its computational cost limits rapid exploration. To solve this problem generative surrogates offer better distribution modeling than deterministic networks, but iterative sampling is slow.

items.title: Unsupervised Continual Clustering via Forward-Backward Knowledge Distillation
